positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring interwoven constellations and deep-sea bioluminescent flora. The design should be highly detailed yet geometrically clean, designed as a central crest or circular emblem. Primary colors are deep sapphire blue, vibrant teal, ethereal gold, and charcoal black. Use high contrast negative space for dramatic effect. The style should mimic professional vintage etching mixed with modern vector art, ensuring sharp lines and perfect silhouettes. The overall composition must be symmetrical and suitable for placement on apparel. Focus on clean gradients and glowing light sources against a dark background.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, jpeg compression, photographic, realism, messy, clutter, busy
